title: How to Configure Email Account in MS Outlook Using POP
description: This SOP explains how to configure a Webmail account in MS Outlook using POP, including server details, ports, authentication, and settings to leave a copy of emails on the server. - For a step-by-step video guide, refer to: https://support.rediffmailpro.com/article/pop-configuration-for-ms-outlook-365/

title: How to Configure Email Account in MS Outlook Using IMAP
description: This SOP explains how to configure a Webmail account in MS Outlook using IMAP, including server details, ports, and authentication settings. - For a step-by-step video guide, refer to: https://support.rediffmailpro.com/article/imap-configuration-for-ms-outlook-365/

title: How to Assign Contact Sync to Individual Users
description: This SOP explains how administrators can assign Contact Sync to individual users in Rediffmail Enterprise. Contact Sync allows users to synchronize the Global Address Book (contacts) with their email client (Microsoft Outlook) using the contact sync connector. - Prerequisites Before proceeding, ensure the following: Administrator has access to the Admin Panel. User is using Microsoft Outlook as the email client. The system has administrator rights for software installation. Outlook is closed during installation. Steps to Assign Contact Sync:

title: How to Configure Calendar Sync Using Outlook Plugin
description: This SOP explains how to enable Calendar Sync between Rediffmail Enterprise and Microsoft Outlook by installing the Calendar Plugin Installer for Outlook. Once configured successfully, users will be able to view and manage their webmail calendar events directly from Outlook. - Prerequisites Before installing the calendar plugin, ensure the following: The setup file is downloaded on the desktop. The system has full administrator rights. Microsoft Outlook is closed before installation. Stable internet connectivity is available. Steps to Configure Calendar Sync: Step 1: Download Calendar Plugin: Download the Calendar Plugin Installer using the link below: - http://beta.rediffmailpro.com/calp/bs/setup.exe Step 2: Save the Installer: Ensure the downloaded setup file is saved on the desktop. Step 3: Install the Plugin: Right-click on the setup file and select Run as Administrator. Follow the on-screen installation instructions. Step 4: Restart Outlook: Once the installation is completed: Exit Microsoft Outlook completely. Reopen Outlook. Step 5: Verify Calendar Sync: After restarting Outlook, check for the Calendar tab. The presence of the calendar tab confirms successful installation. The plugin must be installed with administrator privileges to function correctly. If the Calendar tab does not appear: Restart the system and recheck. Ensure Outlook version compatibility. Any antivirus or endpoint security software may block installation and should be temporarily disabled if required. Calendar synchronization may take a few minutes after first login.

title: Can a user add his profile picture?
description: Yes, a user can add his picture from the webmail account. This will helps others to identify him properly especially If there are others users that has similar names.

title: Can I add external email accounts in Global address book?
description: Yes; the administrator can add email accounts that are not part of your domain from the admin panel. Once added, these email accounts will be then seen in all users Global Address book of the user.

title: Can I search for a user by department or designation?
description: Yes, If the user information is given properly in the system with all the details then you will get the results based on different filters like department, designation, etc.

title: How can I export my personal address book?
description: You need to login to your webmail in the browser. Click on Contacts bar in the left side. In the contacts page, on the menu bar, you will see Export address book.

title: Is it possible to sync GAB with Microsoft Outlook?
description: Yes, Rediffmail Enterprise has a plugin that can be installed on the user’s machine. This plugin will sync the global address book & make it available for the user on Microsoft Outlook. This plugin is available for Microsoft Outlook email client and for other clients like thunderbird, emclient you can use LDAP/Carddav to configure addressbook.

title: What is the difference between the Personal Address Book and the Global Address Book in Rediffmail Enterprise?
description: Rediffmail Enterprise – Address Book. Like all email service providers, Rediffmail Enterprise too has 2 types of address book. 1. Personal Address Book - Managed by individual users - Contains personal or frequently used contacts - Visible only to the user who created it 2. Global Address Book (GAL) - Managed by the organization’s email administrator Contains official email addresses of: - Employees - Shared mailboxes - Groups / distribution lists - Visible to all users in the organization The Global Address Book ensures everyone can easily find and email internal contacts.
